decisions.rationale: Small feature addition extending existing Pushover to update lifecycle
Pushover infrastructure already exists, feature is straightforward integration
Consistent with v0.6 pattern (Phases 30-33), focused scope

decisions.decision: HTTP API trigger only, exclude cron-triggered updates
decisions.rationale: User explicitly asked about update API trigger notifications

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 34 to plan Phase 34: Update Notification Integration. This phase injects Notifier into TriggerHandler and adds start/complete notifications.
context_notes: Milestone v0.7 planning complete. All artifacts committed. The feature is a focused integration: pass existing Notifier to TriggerHandler, send start notification before TriggerUpdate(), send completion notification after with results. Non-blocking goroutine for sends. Graceful degradation when Pushover not configured. Key files to modify: internal/api/trigger.go (add Notifier field), internal/api/server.go (inject Notifier), cmd/nanobot-auto-updater/main.go (pass Notifier to NewServer). Some uncommitted files from v0.6 Phase 32-33 work remain in working tree.
